title: DiscordSRV-Player-Chat-Logs
description: Logged player commands & chats in their own Discord channel.
body:
DiscordSRV Logger Addon


![Base1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9b0af260fd9b2e007ab9e26dc095600c636194a.jpeg)

![Base2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eca04460a9560b4fcfa4e356028f020aab4a189.jpeg)

![Base3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec1ff0fac650136e8b9b760c4810272ab0a6c7c1.jpeg)

Easy to Install: Drag and drop, and it's ready to go! Logs player commands and chat messages directly into dedicated Discord channels.

Discord Channels: Keep track of in-game activity with logs sent directly to custom channels for each player.

Whitelist Feature: Want to control who sees the logs? Use /logwhitelist <discordid> to add Discord users who can view logs. Only whitelisted users and admins can access the logs!

Enhanced DiscordSRV: Now you can execute //commands from the Minecraft chat directly in your Discord channel. This only works for admins and whitelisted users.

Detailed Logging: We log all sorts of useful information, including:

Player Info
Messages
Alternative Names
GameMode
Location (X, Y, Z)
OP Status
UUID
Ping
Timestamp
Join/Leave Logs: Track when players join or leave the server with timestamps.

Permissions:

/logwhitelist <discordid> requires the logwhitelist permission node (or op status).
Make sure you have DiscordSRV installed and start logging player activity with ease! ✨
